mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_REVIEW (REVIEW_ID, USER_ID, REVIEW_RATING, REVIEW_TAGS, REVIEW_CONTENT) VALUES (SEQ_REVIEW.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{reviewRating}, #{reviewTags}, #{reviewContent})
mapper.select: SELECT REVIEW.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, USERS.USER_NICKNAME AS userNickname, USERS.USER_PROFILE AS userProfile, USERS.USER_JOB AS userJob, REVIEW.REVIEW_RATING AS reviewRating, REVIEW.REVIEW_TAGS AS reviewTags, REVIEW.REVIEW_CONTENT AS reviewContent, TO_CHAR(REVIEW.REVIEW_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS reviewDate FROM TBL_REVIEW REVIEW JOIN TBL_USER USERS ON REVIEW.USER_ID = USERS.ID ORDER BY REVIEW.REVIEW_RATING DESC, REVIEW.REVIEW_DATE DESC /* ← 평점+최신순 */
